docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $179.00 FILED BY YEE, JUDY ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIA MANOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO ROSE-MARIE WORTH MGR THE ANTONIA MANOR A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-27-1995, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-30-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. MAIL TO THE ANTONIA MANOR (ROSE MARIE WORTH) RETURNED SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, JUDY ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTONIA MANOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, JUDY ANGEL HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JUDY ANGEL YEE RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-26-1996, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-30-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-11-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, JUDY ANGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTONIA MANOR $179.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY WORTH, ROSE-MARIE HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-1996 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIA MANOR
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-05-1996, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY WORTH, ROSE-MARIE
ORDER SIGNED THAT THE ABOVE MATTER, THAT THE DEFENDANT'S NAME BE CORRECTED TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF ANTONIA MANOR.
